Aaron Tshibola.note: Tshibola gives DR Congo midfield size, helping them compete for second balls and drive through contact.
Aaron Tshibola.noteZh: 奇博拉给刚果民主共和国中场体格，帮助球队争抢第二落点并带球穿过对抗。

Aaron Wan-Bissaka.note: Wan-Bissaka gives DR Congo elite one-on-one defending, especially when quick wingers attack the outside lane.
Aaron Wan-Bissaka.noteZh: 万-比萨卡给刚果民主共和国顶级一对一防守，尤其适合应对快速边锋冲击外线。

Arthur Masuaku.note: Masuaku gives DR Congo left-side delivery and carrying, a route to move attacks up the flank.
Arthur Masuaku.noteZh: 马苏亚库给刚果民主共和国左路传递和带球，是沿边路推进进攻的一条路线。

Axel Tuanzebe.note: Tuanzebe adds defensive recovery speed, useful when DR Congo's back line has to defend transition space.
Axel Tuanzebe.noteZh: 图安泽贝增加防守回追速度，当刚果民主共和国防线需要防守转换空间时很有用。

Brian Cipenga.note: Cipenga gives DR Congo another wide runner, useful for quick breaks before the opponent's block settles.
Brian Cipenga.noteZh: 奇彭加给刚果民主共和国另一名边路跑手，适合在对手阵型站稳前快速反击。

Cedric Bakambu.note: Bakambu remains DR Congo's direct scoring threat, attacking space behind and finishing early chances.
Cedric Bakambu.noteZh: 巴坎布仍是刚果民主共和国直接得分威胁，能攻击身后空间并终结早期机会。

Chancel Mbemba.note: Mbemba gives DR Congo defensive authority, winning aerial duels and organising tense phases.
Chancel Mbemba.noteZh: 姆本巴给刚果民主共和国防守权威，能赢下空中对抗并组织紧张阶段。

Charles Pickel.note: Pickel gives DR Congo a midfield shield, breaking attacks and moving the first pass forward.
Charles Pickel.noteZh: 皮克尔给刚果民主共和国中场屏障，能破坏进攻并把第一脚传球向前送。

Dylan Batubinsika.note: Batubinsika adds centre-back strength, useful when DR Congo need to absorb crosses and clear the box.
Dylan Batubinsika.noteZh: 巴图宾西卡增加中卫强度，当刚果民主共和国需要承受传中并清理禁区时很有用。

Edo Kayembe.note: Kayembe gives DR Congo midfield running, covering pressure and helping the ball escape left.
Edo Kayembe.noteZh: 卡延贝给刚果民主共和国中场跑动，能覆盖压力并帮助皮球从左侧脱身。

Fiston Mayele.note: Mayele gives DR Congo a penalty-box poacher, alive to loose balls and quick service.
Fiston Mayele.noteZh: 马耶莱给刚果民主共和国禁区抢点能力，对松散球和快速传球很敏锐。

Gael Kakuta.note: Kakuta gives DR Congo left-footed imagination, especially when a final pass has to break a compact block.
Gael Kakuta.noteZh: 卡库塔给刚果民主共和国左脚想象力，尤其当最后一传需要打破密集防线时。

Gedeon Kalulu.note: Kalulu gives DR Congo right-side speed, overlapping when space opens and recovering quickly.
Gedeon Kalulu.noteZh: 卡卢卢给刚果民主共和国右路速度，能在空间打开时套上，也能快速回追。

Joris Kayembe.note: Kayembe gives DR Congo width from full-back, pushing attacks up the left without losing recovery speed.
Joris Kayembe.noteZh: 约里斯·卡延贝给刚果民主共和国边后卫宽度，能从左路推进进攻且不丢回追速度。

Lionel Mpasi.note: Mpasi gives DR Congo a commanding goalkeeper presence, important when games become set-piece heavy.
Lionel Mpasi.noteZh: 姆帕西给刚果民主共和国有指挥力的门将存在感，当比赛充满定位球时很重要。

Matthieu Epolo.note: Epolo gives DR Congo young goalkeeper depth, useful insurance for reactive saves and distribution.
Matthieu Epolo.noteZh: 埃波洛给刚果民主共和国年轻门将深度，是反应扑救和出球方面的有用保障。

Meschack Elia.note: Elia gives DR Congo burst speed, stretching defenders and making counters feel immediate.
Meschack Elia.noteZh: 埃利亚给刚果民主共和国爆发速度，能拉开防守者并让反击马上形成威胁。

Nathanael Mbuku.note: Mbuku adds wide invention, able to cut inside and turn a quiet possession into a shot.
Nathanael Mbuku.noteZh: 姆布库增加边路创造，能内切并把平静控球转成射门。

Ngalayel Mukau.note: Mukau gives DR Congo midfield bite, useful for winning duels and keeping the next pass simple.
Ngalayel Mukau.noteZh: 穆考给刚果民主共和国中场硬度，适合赢下对抗并把下一脚处理简单化。

Noah Sadiki.note: Sadiki gives DR Congo flexible midfield control, able to receive pressure and carry into space.
Noah Sadiki.noteZh: 萨迪基给刚果民主共和国灵活中场控制，能在压力下接球并带入空间。

Samuel Moutoussamy.note: Moutoussamy gives DR Congo midfield coverage, helping connect defensive work to the first forward pass.
Samuel Moutoussamy.noteZh: 穆图萨米给刚果民主共和国中场覆盖，帮助把防守工作衔接到第一脚向前传球。

Simon Banza.note: Banza gives DR Congo a strong box target, useful when crosses and early service become the plan.
Simon Banza.noteZh: 班扎给刚果民主共和国强力禁区目标，当传中和早传成为计划时很有用。

Steve Kapuadi.note: Kapuadi gives DR Congo extra reach in defense, valuable against crosses and direct balls.
Steve Kapuadi.noteZh: 卡普阿迪给刚果民主共和国防线额外覆盖范围，面对传中和直接球很有价值。

Theo Bongonda.note: Bongonda gives DR Congo a true winger's threat, beating defenders wide and looking for cutbacks.
Theo Bongonda.noteZh: 邦贡达给刚果民主共和国真正的边锋威胁，能从外线过人并寻找倒三角。

Timothy Fayulu.note: Fayulu gives DR Congo another goalkeeper option, useful for depth and training-ground competition.
Timothy Fayulu.noteZh: 法尤卢给刚果民主共和国另一个门将选择，适合阵容深度和队内竞争。

Yoane Wissa.note: Wissa gives DR Congo Premier League sharpness, pressing hard and attacking the box from the left.
Yoane Wissa.noteZh: 维萨给刚果民主共和国英超级别的锐度，能强力压迫并从左侧攻击禁区。
